productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Striped Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped polo neck T-shirt made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest placket and crystal embellishment on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels.
